title: Gastrolychnis macrosperma
intro: There is no information available on the plant Gastrolychnis macrosperma.
taxonomy: Gastrolychnis macrosperma is classified within the family Primulaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as primulas or primrose. The genus Gastrolychnis is a small group of plants that are native to the Himalayas. Members of the genus are characterized by their showy flowers and often grow in alpine meadows. The classification of Gastrolychnis macrosperma is part of the larger system of plant taxonomy.
